text.title: Adobe Firefly Creative Cloud Integration Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the code artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: Prompt too short; taxonomy empty; missing brand_audit + library + provenance.

forbidden.pattern: Output MUST NOT contain placeholder values listed in the validator script PLACEHOLDERS set. Reject any field whose value matches case-insensitively.
